allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const src = fs.readFileSync\(''C:/Users/Olamide.thinker/Documents/Playground/shan-doc-printer/src/lib/templates.ts'', ''utf8''\); const lines = src.split\(''\\n''\); let issues = []; lines.forEach\(\(line, i\) => { const m = line.match\(/notes:\\s*""\(.*\)""/\); if \(m && m[1].includes\(''""''\)\) issues.push\(i+1 + '': '' + line.trim\(\)\); }\); console.log\(issues.length ? issues.join\(''\\n''\) : ''NO ISSUES FOUND''\);")
